name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: 'Bug: '
labels: bug, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Report Guidelines

Thank you for reporting a bug! Please complete the sections below so we can reproduce and fix the issue quickly.

### Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

### Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Actual behavior
What actually happened.

### Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste error logs to help explain your problem.

### Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.5]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.10.0]
- npm version: [e.g. 10.2.3]
- Browser (if applicable): [e.g. Chrome 124]
- Version / commit: [e.g. v1.0.0 / 8d1e6b96]

### Severity / Priority
Please indicate priority by including one of: `critical`, `urgent`, `production`, `outage`,
`important`, `high`, `blocking`, `medium`, `normal`, `low`, `nice-to-have`, `minor` in the title or body
so the automation can label it correctly.

### Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
